# Walt Viviers — Fine Artist

> South African fine artist working in acrylic and mixed media. Original works available for acquisition. Commissions and gallery representation welcome.

## About

Walt Viviers is a South African fine artist whose practice explores the tension between bold visual impact and expressive painterly process. Works read with clarity and confidence from a distance, yet reveal dynamic brushstrokes and an unmistakable personal touch up close.

Drawing on subjects that range from the iconic to the unexpected, Viviers bridges fine art and popular culture — rendered with energy, intention, and a distinctly South African perspective. Works are held in private collections internationally.

## Works

Original paintings primarily in acrylic on canvas. Subjects include wildlife, portraiture, and character studies. Works are available for acquisition, subject to enquiry.

## Commissions

Custom commissions are available. Each commission begins with a conversation covering scale, subject, palette, and placement. Lead time is typically 8–16 weeks.

## Gallery Representation

Walt Viviers is open to gallery representation and exhibition proposals. Get in touch with a brief introduction and your programme.
